work_experience_normalized.description: Actively contributing at Sesar (Single European Sky ATM Research) department on several projects, from April 2015 to October 2016: - sesari b.04.04 'delineation of the controller working position': design and development of service interfaces for controller working positions, participation in the integration and test of the service interfaces in atc (air traffic control) systems. - sesar2020 pj .16 'workstation, controller productivity': quality control of the proposal elaborated to address the project's call launched by the European Commission under the horizon 2020 framework. - sesar1 b.04.03 'development of the high level logical system architecture and the technical system architecture': delivery of service allocation reports for atm (air traffic management) services. - sesar2020 pj .17 'swim technical infrastructure': internal preparation for solution pj-17-01 related to the swim technology infrastructure in air ground communications.

Providing technical support at Sesar (Single European Sky ATM Research) department on several Sesarari projects, from January 2014 to April 2015: - b.04.03 'development of the high level logical system architecture and the technical system architecture': contribution to Sesar 1 services architecting process. - 14.01.03 'swim design': modelling activities to represent swim technical infrastructure. - b.04.04 'delineation of the controller working position': identification of services and design of standardised service interfaces for the controller working position motivated by virtualisation trends at european level.
